name: Peanut Butter Rocky Road
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, and peanut butter in a 2-quart bowl.
2. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until softened, about 2 to 2 1/2 minutes.
3. Stir until melted and smooth.
4. Mix in marshmallows and peanuts until evenly coated. Spread in a buttered square baking pan, 8 x 8 x 2-inches.
5. Refrigerate until firm, at least 1 hour. Cut into bars, 2 x 1-inch.
6. Makes 32 bars.
